scope: B8.3 label-balanced case-control audit contract -- DESIGN red-team (before Phase B) + Phase-B RESULT red-team. Development-only, NOT confirmatory, NOT validation, NO tag.

design_redteam.verdict: 3 lenses, NO blockers -- Phase B authorized
design_redteam.lens_selector: MAJOR_ISSUE (disclosure, not blocker). Selector Z-blind (signature (C,Y,G,Block,seed), AST-verified no Z/T/oracle), deterministic (per-stratum seeded, C-order independent), EXACTLY balanced by construction (k=min(#HI,#LO) per (subject,block,Y) -> C x Y imbalance==0, verified 400 configs + real SM16). SUBSTANTIVE: count-balancing removes the FIRST-ORDER P(Y|C) main effect but NOT two residual channels -- (a) selection-intensity asymmetry (observed-C discards more than randomized C*; real SM16 obs 3872 vs null 4191 non-overlapping), (b) within-Y C-Z via the collider Y (within-Y E[Zproj|HI]-E[Zproj|LO] ~ -0.15/-0.22 despite exact count balance). Same family that failed B8.2. RECOMMEND: proceed (Phase B measures it), correct overstated 'removed by sampling' wording, pre-register breach->B9/estimand-narrowing.
design_redteam.lens_null_validity: MINOR_ISSUE. The selector-in-null is a VALID exact randomization test: re-applies A under each C* (bug-fix Cq->Cstar correct+necessary, else 200/200 degenerate), assignment-level exchangeability holds (C_obs=registered schedule is a uniform within-(block,Dc) draw), balanced selection removes first-order prior EXACTLY (P(Y|C) 0.34/0.66->0.497/0.497), fail-closed accounting correct+conservative, purity clean (no fitted Y|Z or C|Z, no oracle/B7/observed_T, contract-first, B3 T byte-reused). RESIDUAL = the same collider concern; the n=300 meanT_alone<=7/300 primary screen measures it.
design_redteam.lens_estimand_pos_screen: MINOR_ISSUE. Estimand honest+legitimate (narrowed label-balanced audit-population; NOT defining-away since prior_only/mixed REMAIN in-panel as hard nulls). POS NOT absorbed (POS Tobs above null; Z-blind subsampling preserves the E[Y|Z,C] rotation) but both-gate power at risk (studentized gate bottleneck). Triviality RULED OUT (selN large ~3800, nelig=30, POS detects while prior_only at null -> passing prior_only would be calibration not lack of power). Screens pre-registered, mean-T co-primary, fail->B9/narrow pre-committed.
folded_in_before_phase_b: corrected overstated 'prior removed by sampling' wording (module docstring + protocol + merge SUCCESS string) to 'removes the FIRST-ORDER prior; residual channels tested not assumed gone'
added selection-intensity-asymmetry instrumentation (obs selN - null-mean selN) so a breach is diagnosed as the residual channel not a code fault -- verified ~-450 on prior_only vs ~0 on balanced
strengthened protocol if_b8_3_fails with the predicted collider mechanism
fixed a mt_ge NameError caught by the instrumentation sanity check BEFORE Phase B (would have crashed all 3600 cohorts)

accounting_isolation.detail: 3600 records reproduced from 72 raw shards; task_ids+seeds 3600/3600 unique; 0 worker errors; states sum 50/block + 300/condition; all 72 .sha256 verify. Main table reproduces EXACTLY (prior_only both-gate 2 / mean-T 28; cov_plus_prior 10/22; balanced 3/6; random 4/5; POS 19/93 & 30/105; violations 0/300 alert + 300/300 INVALID). ENGINE REUSE: realeeg_b8_1.py byte-identical to committed B8.1 (cmp identical); realeeg_b8_3.py sha fa59a34134d4e645 == protocol pin; commit d99ab79 precedes first shard; all 72 prov record the pinned module sha. BALANCE: C x Y imbalance==0 on all 1800 selection-bearing records, -1 (no selection) on 1800 violation records, 0 outside {-1,0}; 26 POS SAMPLER_INVALID all carry imbalance 0 (cross-fit/estimability, not balance). Fail-closed confirmed. ISOLATION: decision=both-gate (ALERT strict subset of mean-T; ALERT&!meanT=0; mean-T 28>>both-gate 2 => mean-T not the decision gate); no pooling; Z-blind selector. Seeds 620e6+idx*1e6+cohort, EXACT 0 intersection with the B8.2 seed set + all prior. NO FABRICATION: 28/22 mean-T + -390/-388/+2 asymmetries recomputed from raw bypassing the merge; 2-cohort end-to-end frozen-engine re-run matched 13 fields bit-for-bit.
notes_low: B8.2 mean-T-alone (46/49) was not a recorded gate in the committed B8.2 tables (mean-T became primary only in B8.3); recomputed from B8.2 raw shards it matches the cited 46/49.
POS_boundary fail-closed exclusions (INSUFFICIENT 10 + SAMPLER 15) reduce both-gate power to 19/300 (case-control halving of per-stratum counts; disclosed).

science.verdict: MINOR_ISSUE -- INSUFFICIENT genuine + decisive + honestly framed; refinements folded into the verdict.
science.honest_verdict_label: INSUFFICIENT -- the label-balanced audit contract HALVES but does NOT control the prior-collider residual (mean-T 28/300 CP95 [6.29,13.21]% & 22/300 CP95 [4.65,10.89]%, both LOWER bounds >> the 2.33% primary bar; binom p=3.8e-9 & 9.1e-6). Genuine ~40-55% first-order-prior removal (Fisher 46->28 p=0.034; 49->22 p=9e-4) -- worked as designed, NOT inert -- but the second-order collider residual survives. Do NOT read the studentized-masked both-gate 2/300 as success (mean-T is primary precisely because the both-gate would FALSELY pass here). POS_boundary 19/300 also missed the >=20 strong bar = POWER (smaller balanced sample; mean-T 93 shows the boundary signal intact, not absorption); POS+prior 30/300 met >=15. Violations refuse 300/300 (by construction). -> B9 randomized-acquisition / estimand-narrowing, NOT gate-tuning. Emulator/dev-only, single 6-block replicate.

findings.detail: the auto-verdict must also disclose POS_boundary missed its >=20 strong bar (19/300), attributed to reduced power in the smaller balanced audit sample (median selN 3377 vs 4188, sel-intensity -801), NOT concept absorption -- mean-T 93/300 (Fisher vs balanced-null p=2e-24) shows the boundary signal is intact and the studentized gate is the bottleneck. FOLDED IN.

channel (a) selection-intensity asymmetry CONFIRMED in-run (-390/-388 vs +2, co-located with the breaches); channel (b) within-Y C-Z is design-asserted (Phase-A within-Y Zproj -0.15/-0.22), NOT freshly re-measured (the logged within_block_C_Z_auc ~0.499 is the MARGINAL AUC correctly zeroed by balancing). FOLDED IN.
'did NOT control' must be paired with the genuine ~40-55% mean-T reduction so it is not misread as 'inert' -- the contract worked as designed and is INSUFFICIENT, not nothing. FOLDED IN.

lean the INSUFFICIENT conclusion on the mean-T primary screen (28/22), not the cov_plus_prior both-gate 10/300 (CP95 [1.61,6.04]% covers nominal, binom p=0.22) -- exactly why mean-T was pre-registered as primary. FOLDED IN.

net: B8.3 Phase B = INSUFFICIENT (pre-registered). The label-balanced case-control audit-sampling contract removes the FIRST-ORDER prior main effect exactly and genuinely HALVES the prior-collider mean-T residual (46->28, 49->22, Fisher-significant) -- but does NOT control it to nominal (mean-T 28/300 & 22/300 >> 7/300), because the second-order collider residual (selection-intensity asymmetry CONFIRMED -390 + within-Y C-Z design-asserted) structurally survives count-balancing. POS survives but POS_boundary 19<20 (power). Violations refuse by construction. Per pre-registration -> B9 genuinely randomized audit acquisition OR estimand-narrowing, NOT gate-tuning. The whole information-contract line (B8.0->B8.3) has been pushed to its emulator limit without genuinely randomized acquisition. Engine byte-reused, seeds disjoint, exact balance, NO tag.
